body:
Pink Garnet Expansion Pack
Summary:
Transform your Minecraft experience with the Pink Garnet Expansion Pack, an enchanting addition that introduces pink garnet-themed blocks, tools, armor, and game mechanics. With its vibrant aesthetic and creative features, this mod enhances gameplay and inspires players to build and explore like never before! Whether you're a builder, adventurer, or collector, there's something here for everyone.

Description:
The Pink Garnet Expansion Pack brings a stunning and unique gemstone into your Minecraft world, adding a layer of creativity and depth to the game. Here's what you can expect: Features:
Pink Garnet Blocks & Items:
Discover a dazzling collection of pink garnet-themed blocks, from decorative bricks to glowing ores. Craft tools, weapons, and armor infused with the power of pink garnet, offering unique properties like increased durability and speed. New Gameplay Mechanics:
Introduces exclusive mechanics tied to pink garnets, such as enhanced mining capabilities and special buffs when wearing full pink garnet armor sets. Custom Crafting Recipes:
Unlock new crafting recipes to make pink garnet items, enabling players to incorporate these vibrant materials into their builds and strategies. Immersive Mining and Exploration:
-Search for pink garnet ore deep in your world, and discover rare veins with a glowing aesthetic to guide you. The thrill of hunting for this rare gem will add excitement to mining expeditions. Creative Possibilities:
-Add a splash of color and style to your builds with pink garnet blocks and decorative options. Why Download This Mod? This mod is perfect for players who:
-Love unique and vibrant aesthetics. -Want to expand their collection of tools, armor, and building materials. -Enjoy mods that add fresh gameplay elements while staying true to Minecraft's core experience. -Are looking to spark creativity with new decorative blocks and items.

Environment Information:
Client-Side and Server-Side: This mod requires installation on both the client and server to work correctly, ensuring all players in multiplayer can see and interact with pink garnet features seamlessly.

Compatibility: Works with 1.21.1

Installation Instructions:
-Just download the mod and place the .jar file in you mod folder! -Use fabric!
